R0225.title: Webhook Forgery and Event Replay
R0225.definition: Attackers forge or replay webhook events to trigger false payments, shipments, authorizations, or status changes.
R0225.description: Attackers forge or replay webhook events to trigger false payments, shipments, authorizations, or status changes.
R0225.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
